query:
SELECT id, name, position, club, league, nationality, overall, potential, age,
  CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = 'NULL' THEN 'SEM IMAGEM' ELSE 'COM IMAGEM' END as tem_imagem
FROM players
WHERE league NOT IN (
  'Premier League', 'Bundesliga', 'La Liga', 'Ligue 1', 'Serie A',
  'Primeira Liga', 'Eredivisie', 'First Division A', 'Championship',
  'Jupiler Pro League', 'Pro League', 'Süper Lig', 'Super League Greece',
  'Saudi Pro League', 'Bundesliga 2', '2. Bundesliga', 'Super League',
  'La Liga 2', 'Serie B', 'Ligue 2', 'LaLiga 2', 'EFL Championship'
)
ORDER BY league, overall DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT id, name, position, club, league, nationality, overall, potential, age,
  CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = 'NULL' THEN 'SEM IMAGEM' ELSE 'COM IMAGEM' END as tem_imagem
FROM players
WHERE league NOT IN (
  'Premier League', 'Bundesliga', 'La Liga', 'Ligue 1', 'Serie A',
  'Primeira Liga', 'Eredivisie', 'First Division A', 'Championship',
  'Jupiler Pro League', 'Pro League', 'Süper Lig', 'Super League Greece',
  'Saudi Pro League', 'Bundesliga 2', '2. Bundesliga', 'Super League',
  'La Liga 2', 'Serie B', 'Ligue 2', 'LaLiga 2', 'EFL Championship'
)
ORDER BY league, overall DESC;
